items.title: Happy Birthday, Harrison Barnes 🥳
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
Happy Birthday, Harrison Barnes 🥳

Can the Spurs give him a winner-take-all Game 7 win as a birthday present tonight??

SAS/OKC | 8:00pm/et on NBC/Peacock

NBA Conference Finals presented by Google

items.title: Game 7 of the Western Conference finals falling on Harrison Barnes' 34th birthday could be a good omen for the Spurs.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Game 7 of the Western Conference finals falling on Harrison Barnes' 34th birthday could be a good omen for the Spurs.

“He's been able to just kind of calm us down and just tell us kind of what to expect,” Devin Vassell said. 

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Why Harrison Barnes could be the Spurs' Game 7 good-luck charm
media.description: Game 7 falling on the forward's 34th birthday could be a favorable omen for the Spurs ahead of their showdown with the Thunder.

items.title: In NBA history, players are 7–0 when playing in a Game 7 on their birth day. Harrison Barnes turns 34 on the day the Game 7 between the Thunder and the Spurs takes place.
items.author: SeanKilpatrickFan
items.body_excerpt: The 7 previous instances of it happening: Paul George (PHI) against the Boston Celtics on May 2nd 2026; he turned 36 years old. Harrison Barnes (GSW) against Oklahoma City Thunder on May 30th 2016; he turned 24 years old. Pablo Prigioni (HOU) against Los Angeles Clippers on May…

items.title: #Spurs notebook leads off with a look at how Harrison Barnes is garnering praise despite limited playing time.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
#Spurs notebook leads off with a look at how Harrison Barnes is garnering praise despite limited playing time.

“He knows how to calm us down, and if he's not playing, he's giving us words of wisdom,” Devin Vassell said.

Also, Wemby is First-Team All-NBA.

items.title: League announces Bam Adebayo as the 2025-26 Social Justice Champion. Losing the Kareem Abdul-Jabbar Trophy to the Miami star doesn’t diminish all the good work performed this season by Harrison Barnes.
